name: Pennsylvania Dutch Apple Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the cider to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Add the chopped apples (cut into eighths) and return to a boil.
4. Cook until the apples are very tender.
5. Remove from heat, then strain through a sieve to remove peels and seeds.
6. Return the strained liquid to the kettle.
7. Stir in sugar, ground allspice, cloves, cinnamon, and salt.
8. Simmer slowly until thickened.
9. Pour into jars or a crock and allow to cool.
